narrative:
Tallmadge 2-A (precinct in Summit County) has 1,162 registered voters, with 51.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 22.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.9 percentage points.
